2072696036251066877.full_text:
After 9 long years, Team India is set to tour Sri Lanka for a Test series! 

Both teams will play a 2-match Test series:
1st Test - 15th to 19th August, Galle
2nd Test - 23rd to 27th August, Colombo

The opening Test in Galle will also mark a historic milestone, It will be India’s 600th Test match 🔥

2072710638431060225.full_text:
🚨 AB DE VILLIERS ROASTED AND SLAMS INDIA TEAM MANEGEMENT FOR BENCHING VAIBHAV SURYAVANSHI 🚨 

AB de Villiers said 🗣️,

"When will he be unleashed? I thought the Ireland series was the perfect opportunity for him to come in and get a feel for international cricket. It was unfortunate that he never got an opportunity. I beg to differ with Ryan Ten Doeschate saying Suryavanshi has to go through the process like any other player. After the IPL he had, it was time to throw him into the deep end, especially against a lower team like Ireland."
